description_long: This is a robust wooden crate with a weathered, natural wood finish and reinforced slats on its sides. Prominently displayed on multiple faces is a red diamond-shaped warning label reading 'FLAMMABLE GAS 2', accompanied by a flame icon, indicating hazardous contents. The crate features a flat, solid top and bottom, with no visible handles or openings, and appears to be fully enclosed. Several adhesive shipping or inventory labels are affixed to the exterior, adding to its utilitarian, industrial appearance. The wood grain and surface imperfections suggest it is designed for heavy-duty storage or transport, likely in industrial or urban environments. Its size and construction imply it is intended to be placed on the floor or stacked with similar crates.
description: A sturdy wooden crate with 'FLAMMABLE GAS 2' warning labels and shipping stickers, featuring a weathered, industrial look. The box is fully enclosed with a flat top and no visible handles.
description_view_0: This view shows a side with diagonal wooden slats and a partially visible flammable gas warning label, along with an adhesive shipping label.
description_view_1: This view displays a full face of the crate with a centered, clear 'FLAMMABLE GAS 2' warning label and a shipping sticker in the upper right corner.
description_view_2: This view presents another solid face with a faded 'FLAMMABLE GAS 2' label and a shipping sticker in the lower left corner.
description_view_3: This view shows a face with a prominent, well-preserved 'FLAMMABLE GAS 2' warning label and a shipping sticker in the lower right.
